headline: PPG Board of Directors approves dividend increase to 74 cents per share
summary: PITTSBURGH, July 16, 2026--The Board of Directors of PPG (NYSE:PPG) today approved a 3-cents-per-share increase in the company’s dividend, declaring a regular quarterly dividend of 74 cents per share, payable Sept. 11 to shareholders of record Aug. 10.

headline: PPG Launches Paint Visualization Tool for Aviation Sector
summary: PPG Industries' Aeroview tool lets aviation customers visualize aircraft paint in 3D, reducing design uncertainty and repaint errors.
